name: RUSSIA BATTLEGROUNDS
short_description: RUSSIA BATTLEGROUNDS - is a online Battle Royale shooter in which players fight for their homeland. Only your fierce anger and cruelty will help you survive in this bloodbath.
detailed_description:
RUSSIA BATTLEGROUNDS - is a multiplayer Battle Royale and your ticket to hell. It is here that the epochal battle of the century will unfold, in which the strongest will win. In addition to hostile simulacra, unusual encounters with unexplored anomalies and mysteries await you. Only your fierce anger and cruelty will help you survive in this bloodbath.

Features:

  • Retro-style

  • Many unusual locations and secrets

  • Dynamic gameplay

  • Highest level of optimization

  • Translation into 24 languages (Ugandan too)

supported_languages:
English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
